results.title: Modi, Albanese Boost Trade and Defence Ties
results.description: PM Narendra Modi and Australian PM Anthony Albanese agreed to accelerate CECA negotiations while expanding cooperation in defence, trade, renewable energy, technology and critical minerals.

results.title: World Padel League to return to Mumbai with expanded sixth franchise season
results.description: The World Padel League returns to Mumbai from August 12-16, 2026, featuring six franchises and 36 elite players, marking a milestone for padel in India.

results.title: Akanksha Choudhary throws water on Shreya Kalra’s bed and food in Lock Upp 2 - Watch
results.description: In a vengeful rage, Akanksha breached accepted standards of behaviour by intentionally damaging Shreya’s belongings – soaking her food and mattress and ripping bedding apart.

results.title: Japan winger Mitoma ‘apologetic’ after hitting cyclist with car
results.description: Mitoma missed the World Cup after suffering an injury playing in the Premier League less than a week before Japan named its squad for the tournament.

results.title: Thai parliament approves amnesty for hundreds of activists
results.description: Thailand’s parliament passed an amnesty bill on Wednesday (Jul 8) benefitting hundreds of activists found guilty over the last 20 years, but not those sentenced for corruption or violating the royal insult law. The bill covers members of both the conservative, royalist “Yellow Shirts” and the “Red Shirts” who backed populist former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra, rival... results.title: Sanjay Raut criticises Devendra Fadnavis over governance and ‘Missing Link’ remarks
results.description: Sanjay Raut criticises Maharashtra CM Devendra Fadnavis over governance and remarks on the Missing Link project amid concerns of corruption and intimidation.
